mapper.select: select category_id,name,parent_id from categories where parent_id IS NULL order by category_id
select category_id,name,parent_id from categories where parent_id=#{value} order by category_id
select parent_id from categories where category_id=#{value}
select name from categories where category_id=#{value}
SELECT category_id,name,parent_id from categories where parent_id IS NOT NULL order by parent_id, category_id

SELECT p.category_id parent_id, p.name parent_name, c.category_id child_id, c.name child_name FROM categories p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY p.category_id, c.category_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NULL
SELECT category_id, name, parent_id FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY category_id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
